description_long: This is a tall, slender beverage can with a pink background, decorated with multiple cartoon-style strawberries scattered across its surface. The front of the can features the word 'milky' in playful blue letters, with 'Strawberry Flavor' written below, indicating the drink's flavor. The can has a standard metallic top with a pull-tab opening, typical of canned drinks. On the back, there is a detailed nutrition facts panel and a barcode, both printed in black on a white background. The overall design is whimsical and visually appealing, targeting a youthful audience with its bright colors and fun graphics. The can appears to be made of aluminum, commonly used for carbonated or flavored drinks.
description: A tall, pink aluminum can decorated with cartoon strawberries and labeled 'milky' strawberry flavor, featuring a nutrition facts panel and a pull-tab top.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'milky' logo in blue, 'Strawberry Flavor' text, and several strawberry graphics on a pink background.
description_view_1: This side view displays more strawberry graphics and the edge of a barcode, with no visible text or logo.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the nutrition facts panel, barcode, and additional strawberry graphics, with no prominent branding.
description_view_3: This view shows the side of the can with more strawberry graphics and a partial view of the nutrition label.
attribute_brand_logo: The front features the word 'milky' in blue, stylized lowercase letters, located near the bottom of the can. No other brand logo is visible.
attribute_flavor_indication: The can is covered in cartoon strawberry graphics and labeled 'Strawberry Flavor' on the front, clearly indicating a strawberry flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back of the can, listing nutritional information and ingredients.
